Metadata.title: Antiblaze | Scroll snap test
Metadata.description: Scroll-snap prototype with a fixed navbar, section tracking and full-screen vertical sections.

section1.title: The new generation of protection for roofing systems.
section1.description: The evolution from <brand>Duralfoil®</brand> becomes a clearer, more current proposition that can communicate technical value from the first screen.

section2.title: Thermal Control for Demanding Roofs
section2.problemLine1: Roof systems absorb solar heat and push it indoors.
section2.problemLine2: That raises interior temperatures and affects people, equipment, product and energy use.
section2.product: Antiblaze is a reflective under-roof insulation made with highly reflective aluminum and fire-resistant materials, installed beneath metal, fiber cement, concrete and other roof types.
section2.howItWorks: It limits radiant heat before it enters the space, while also supporting moisture, vapor and acoustic control.

benefit1.title: Lower Interior Heat
benefit1.description: Reduces heat gain from the roof.

benefit2.title: Better Operating Conditions
benefit2.description: Helps protect people, equipment and product.

benefit3.title: Moisture and Vapor Control
benefit3.description: Adds protection against moisture and vapor.

benefit4.title: Lightweight and Durable
benefit4.description: Built for long-term performance with lower cooling demand.

section2.support: Antiblaze combines thermal performance, fire resistance and durability in one practical under-roof solution.
section2.ctaSupport: Assess the thermal impact on your project
section2.comparisonDescription: Reserved space for the roof heat-behavior diagram.

section3.title: Current Product
section3.description: Third full-screen snap target inside the same scroll container.

section4.title: Next Step
section4.description: Final section using the same snap layout and observer-based section tracking.
